mapper.select: SELECT service_type_id, type_name, description, base_price, min_duration, image_url, create_time, update_time FROM service_type ORDER BY service_type_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_type (type_name, description, base_price, min_duration, image_url) VALUES (#{typeName}, #{description}, #{basePrice}, #{minDuration}, #{imageUrl})
